Title: Identify the target audience for the application
Test Steps:
1. Check if the application is designed primarily as a tool for monitoring newborns.
2. Verify that the application supports parents in keeping up with every task related to their child's growth.
Expected Result: The application should be identified as a tool for monitoring newborns and supporting parents in their tasks.

Title: User can create an account using Google sign-in
Preconditions: Application installed, user has a Google account.
Test Steps:
1. Tap "Sign in with Google" button.
2. Enter Google credentials.
3. Confirm account creation.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the family creation screen.

Title: User can create a family
Test Steps:
1. Tap "Crea" button.
2. Provide newborn information.
3. Confirm family creation.
Expected Result: User's profile is automatically added to the newly created family.

Title: User can add a family member
Preconditions: User is a member of a family.
Test Steps:
1. Copy family code.
2. Share family code with another user.
3. New user enters the family code.
Expected Result: New user is added to the family.

Title: User can record and consult sleep hours
Test Steps:
1. Tap "registra" button.
2. Record sleep hours.
3. Save data.
Expected Result: Sleep hours are recorded and can be consulted from the home screen.

Title: User can record and consult feeding times
Test Steps:
1. Tap "registra" button.
2. Record feeding times.
3. Save data.
Expected Result: Feeding times are recorded and can be consulted from the home screen.

Title: User can record and consult child's growth data
Test Steps:
1. Tap "registra" button.
2. Record child's weight and height.
3. Save data.
Expected Result:
Growth data is recorded and can be consulted from the home screen.
Note: No additional test cases were generated for the sections on collaboration model and functional requirements as they did not contain specific testable scenarios. <|

Title: Create Family
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Create Family" section.
2. Fill in the required fields for creating a family.
3. Click on the "Create" button.
Expected Result: A new family record should be created successfully.

Title: Monitor Sleep
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Monitor Sleep" section.
2. Enter the start time of the baby's sleep.
3. Enter the end time of the baby's sleep.
4. Click on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The sleep data should be saved successfully and displayed in a graph.

Title: Monitor Feeding
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Monitor Feeding" section.
2. Start the timer for the right breast.
3. Start the timer for the left breast.
4. Stop both timers.
5. Click on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The feeding data should be saved successfully.

Title: Monitor Growth
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Monitor Growth" section.
2. Enter the required growth data.
3. Click on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The growth data should be saved successfully and monitored over time.

Title: Data Conformity
Test Steps:
1. Close the application.
2. Ensure that the data is synchronized with the cloud.
Expected Result: Data should be synchronized and consistent across devices.

Title: Device Compatibility
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on an Android device with version 8.1 or higher.
2. Verify that all features work as expected.
Expected Result: The application should function correctly on the specified Android versions.

Title: Performance
Test Steps:
1. Navigate through the application.
2. Perform actions that require data processing.
Expected Result: The application should navigate smoothly without excessive delays.

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Log in using a Google account.
Expected Result: The user should be able to log in successfully.

Title: Internet Connection
Test Steps:
1. Ensure the device has an active internet connection.
2. Attempt to access features that require internet.
Expected Result: Features requiring internet should function properly.

Title: Data Privacy
Test Steps: 1. Verify that sensitive data is not shared without user consent.
Expected Result:
Sensitive data should remain private unless voluntarily shared.

2. Register a new user account.
3. Measure the time taken for registration.
Expected Result: The registration process should complete within 3 seconds.

Title: Family Creation
Test Steps:
1. Create a new family.
2. Verify the creation of the family.
Expected Result: A new family should be successfully created.

Title: User Invitation
Test Steps:
1. Invite another user to join the existing family using a family code.
2. Verify the addition of the invited user to the family.
Expected Result: The invited user should be added to the existing family.

Preconditions: Application installed and multiple users logged in.

Expected Result: Multiple users should be able to access the application without issues.

Title: Data Persistence
Preconditions: Application installed and user logged in.

Title: System Portability
